items.final_wording: Supports documenting that a transmission was triaged and reviewed by qualified staff, signed off, communicated, and linked to an already decided follow-up action.

source.title: 2023 HRS/EHRA/APHRS/LAHRS expert consensus statement on practical management of the remote device clinic
source.population: People with cardiovascular implantable electronic devices enrolled in in-clinic or remote device follow-up.
source.setting: Cardiac device clinics, remote monitoring programs, data triage, alert review, documentation, communication, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting CIED enrollment and connectivity context, scheduled and unscheduled transmissions, data review, alerts, qualified sign-off, communication, and follow-up. It does not interpret device data, program alerts, diagnose an event, or generate a treatment or emergency plan.

exact_location.heading: Sections 4-5 - staffing, data triage, review, final sign-off, documentation, and communication

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting that a transmission was triaged and reviewed by qualified staff, signed off, communicated, and linked to an already decided follow-up action.

items.rationale: The multisociety device-clinic statement supports documenting device-follow-up context, transmission or in-clinic data review, qualified sign-off, communication, and arranged follow-up without interpreting device findings.

items.final_wording: Supports recording received alerts, priority assigned by a qualified clinic, review, communication, and emergency-system limitations without generating alert programming, urgency, diagnosis, or treatment.

source.title: 2023 HRS/EHRA/APHRS/LAHRS expert consensus statement on practical management of the remote device clinic
source.population: People with cardiovascular implantable electronic devices enrolled in in-clinic or remote device follow-up.
source.setting: Cardiac device clinics, remote monitoring programs, data triage, alert review, documentation, communication, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting CIED enrollment and connectivity context, scheduled and unscheduled transmissions, data review, alerts, qualified sign-off, communication, and follow-up. It does not interpret device data, program alerts, diagnose an event, or generate a treatment or emergency plan.

exact_location.heading: Section 8 - alert definition, review, and communication

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording received alerts, priority assigned by a qualified clinic, review, communication, and emergency-system limitations without generating alert programming, urgency, diagnosis, or treatment.

items.rationale: Alert review was checked for follow-up applicability; no alert, urgency, device event, or treatment is inferred.
